PROJECTS.HAPPY_BIRTHDAY_DESCRIPTION: I transformed the visual experience with smooth animations that connect each page. I optimized performance and user experience by migrating the React base to Svelte.

PROJECTS.FITZONE_GYM_DESCRIPTION: My first website, in which I implemented CSS using the BEM methodology. I also applied modern techniques such as CSS Nesting, CSS variables and media queries with conditionals.
